_doc: Golden retrieval set for the offline eval harness (kleos-lib/tests/retrieval_eval.rs). The in-memory test DB runs the FTS5 + RRF fusion + structured-filter path only (sqlite-vec / LanceDB are not loaded, so the vector channel is inert and embedding is None). FTS5 here uses the default unicode61 tokenizer with NO stemming, so every query token must appear VERBATIM in a relevant doc to match under the current implicit-AND join. 'stable' queries satisfy that and form the CI floor. 'probe_fts_or' queries deliberately omit one token from the relevant docs so the implicit-AND join returns nothing and only OR-fusion (Phase 1.3) recovers them. 'probe_filter' exposes truncate-before-filter (Phase 1.4): high-tf out-of-category docs fill the limit and the in-category docs are dropped until over-fetch lands.

corpus.content: cancel a running tokio task by calling abort on the join handle
spawn a tokio task on the multi thread runtime
structured concurrency awaits child futures together in scope
the join handle resolves to the spawn output value
the embedding model produces dense vectors for semantic similarity
hybrid search fuses keyword ranking with vector cosine using reciprocal rank fusion
a cross encoder reranker scores query documents to reorder the candidates
spaced repetition schedules review using retrievability decay over elapsed days
postgres uses a write ahead log for durability of committed transactions
sqlite stores the database in a single file and supports full text search
wireguard builds an encrypted tunnel using public key cryptography
a reverse proxy terminates tls and forwards requests to backend services

queries.note: all four tokens appear verbatim only in ra2
PROBE 1.3: 'stop' is in no doc; implicit-AND returns 0, OR recovers ra1/ra2 via tokio+task
PROBE 1.3: no single doc has all four tokens; rb2 lacks 'documents', rb3 lacks vector/cosine/ranking; OR recovers both
PROBE 1.4: eight 'alpha alpha' misc docs outrank the three single-alpha rust docs; truncate(5)-then-filter returns 0, over-fetch-then-filter returns the rust docs
